memoryArtifacts.description: Nicholas Fitzherbert, High Sheriff of Derbyshire and 11th Lord of Norbury died in 1473. He is shown in full plate armour with a collar of alternating suns and roses with a pendant of the White Lion of the House of Marche, the badge of Edward IV. There is a small angel supporting his right foot.  His children are displayed as weepers around the tomb, 10 sons and 7 daughters by two wives.

zh.lifeSummary: 當Nicholas FitzHerbert於大約1410年出生在英國德比夏爾諾波利時，他的父親Sir Roger de Herdeburgh II151歲，母親Ida Oddingsells141歲。他於1416年之後與Alice Booth在英國結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他於1466年被列為sheriff of derbyshire 。他去世於1473年11月19日在英國英格蘭德比夏爾諾波利享年64歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭德比夏爾諾波利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Nicholas FitzHerbert于大约1410年出生在英国德比夏爾諾波利时，他的父亲Sir Roger de Herdeburgh II151岁，母亲Ida Oddingsells141岁。他于1416年之后与Alice Booth在英国结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他于1466年被列为sheriff of derbyshire 。他去世于1473年11月19日在英国英格兰德比夏爾諾波利享年64岁，埋葬在英国英格兰德比夏爾諾波利。

nameMeanings.name: FitzHerbert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish: from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (see Fitz ) + the personal name Herbert (see Herbert ), ‘son of Herbert’.

variants.name: Fitz
meanings: English: from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (from Latin filius), used originally to distinguish a son from a father bearing the same personal name and then conventionalized as a hereditary surname, or short for a surname of which fiz ‘son’ was the first element, for example Fitzhenry and Fitzroy .
German: from a vernacular pet form of the personal name Vinzenz (see Vincent ) or Vitus (see Vito , compare Veit ). Compare also Fietz .

nameMeanings.name: Nicholas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the post-classical Greek personal name Nikolaos, derived from nikē ‘victory’ + laos ‘people’. The spelling with -ch- first occurred as early as the 12th century, and became firmly established at the time of the Reformation, although Nicolas is still occasionally found. St Nicholas was a 4th-century bishop of Myra in Lycia, about whom virtually nothing factual is known, although a vast body of legend grew up around him, and he became the patron saint of Greece and of Russia, as well as of children, sailors, merchants, and pawnbrokers. His feast day is 6 December , and among the many roles which legend has assigned to him is that of bringer of Christmas presents, in the guise of ‘Santa Claus’ (an alteration of the Dutch form of his name, Sinterklaas).

variants.name: Nickolas
meanings: Mainly U.S.: variant spelling of   Nicholas  , influenced by the short form   Nick .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Nicholas FitzHerbert was born about 1410, in Norbury, Derbyshire, England, his father, Sir Roger de Herdeburgh II, was 151 and his mother, Ida Oddingsells, was 141. He married Alice Booth after 1416, in England. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 5 daughters. In 1466, at the age of 57, his occupation is listed as sheriff of derbyshire . He died on 19 November 1473, in Norbury, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 64, and was buried in Norbury, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Nicholas FitzHerbert est né environ 1410, à Norbury, Derbyshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Roger de Herdeburgh II, avait 151 ans et sa mère, Ida Oddingsells, avait 141 ans. Il a épousé Alice Booth après 1416, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 5 filles. En 1466, à l’âge de 57 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est sheriff of derbyshire . Il est décédé le 19 novembre 1473, à Norbury, Derbyshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 64 ans, et a été enterré à Norbury, Derbyshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Nicholas FitzHerbert um 1410 in Norbury, Derbyshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Roger de Herdeburgh II 151 und seine Mutter Ida Oddingsells 141. Er hat nach 1416 in England Alice Booth geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 5 Töchter. 1466, als er 57 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als sheriff of derbyshire  aufgeführt. Er starb am 19. November 1473 im Alter von 64 Jahren in Norbury, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Norbury, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Nicholas FitzHerbert è nato il circa 1410 nel Norbury, Derbyshire, England, il suo padre, Sir Roger de Herdeburgh II, aveva 151 anni e il suo madre, Ida Oddingsells, aveva 141 anni. Lui sposato Alice Booth dopo il 1416, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 5 figlie. Nel 1466, all'età di 57 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come sheriff of derbyshire . Morì il 19 novembre 1473, nel Norbury, Derbyshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 64 anni, e fu sepolto a Norbury, Derbyshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Nicholas FitzHerbertが約1410年にイギリスデルブイシュアイアノーブリーで生まれた時，父Sir Roger de Herdeburgh IIは151歳，母Ida Oddingsellsは141歳であった。1416年以後にイギリスでAlice Boothと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。1466年，57歳の時，職業はsheriff of derbyshire と記録されている。彼は1473年11月19日にイギリスイギリスデルブイシュアイアノーブリーで64歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスデルブイシュアイアノーブリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Nicholas FitzHerbert(이)가 대략 1410년 영국 더비실르 노르버이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Roger de Herdeburgh II(은)는 151세였고, 그의 어머니 Ida Oddingsells(은)는 141세였다. 그는 1416년 이후 영국에서 Alice Booth(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 1466년, 57세의 나이로 그의 직업은 sheriff of derbyshire 이었다. 그는 1473년 11월 19일 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르 노르버이에서 64세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르 노르버이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Nicholas FitzHerbert nasceu aproximadamente 1410, em Norbury, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Roger de Herdeburgh II, tinha 151 anos e sua mãe, Ida Oddingsells, tinha 141 anos. Ele casou-se com Alice Booth após 1416, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 5 filhas. Em 1466, com 57 anos, sua profissão aparece como sheriff of derbyshire . Ele faleceu em 19 de novembro de 1473, em Norbury, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 64 anos, e foi sepultado em Norbury, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Nicholas FitzHerbert родился около 1410 г. в местности норбури, дирбишир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Roger de Herdeburgh II было 151 год, а матери, которую звали Ida Oddingsells, 141. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice Booth после 1416 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 5 дочерей. В 1466 году, в возрасте 57 лет,  он работал по профессии sheriff of derbyshire . Он умер 19 ноября 1473 г. в местности норбури, дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 64 лет и был похоронен в местности норбури, дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Nicholas FitzHerbert nació aproximadamente 1410, en Norbury, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Roger de Herdeburgh II, tenía 151 años y su mamá, Ida Oddingsells, tenía 141 años. Se casó con Alice Booth después de 1416, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 5 hijas. En 1466, a la edad de 57 años, su ocupación registrada era sheriff of derbyshire . Murió el 19 de noviembre de 1473, en Norbury, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 64 años, y fue sepultado en Norbury, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
